summary: Iter 289 backend verification of wa_service Docker build fix + shift regressions. Dockerfile switched to node:20-bookworm-slim with apt-get install of python3/make/g++/git/ca-certificates verified. wa_service on :3002 responds with proper JSON shape (connected/qr/error). Regression suite 6/6 PASS. shift_id enforcement 400+Arabic works. Only pre-existing iter288 cashier isolation bug on /summary remains (unfixed, out-of-scope for this Docker fix).

critical.issue: PRE-EXISTING (iter288 unfixed): cashier isolation broken. Cashier passing another user's shift_id (closefix-shift-owner) receives HTTP 200 with THEIR OWN shift summary (closefix-shift-cashier) instead of 403/404. Root cause at shifts_routes.py:1339-1364 — lazy-create fallback fires when strict {id, cashier_id:me} query misses. Not related to Docker fix but still open.

docker_fix_verification.apt_packages: python3 make g++ git ca-certificates (verified lines 7-9)
docker_fix_verification.install_step: conditional yarn install --production --frozen-lockfile with fallback to npm install (lines 17-23) — verified syntactically
docker_fix_verification.index_js: present (6230 bytes), supervised on :3002 — status endpoint returns valid JSON {connected:false, qr:base64-png, error:null}
docker_fix_verification.docker_compose_wa_service: verified: build ./wa_service, container maestro-wa-service, backend depends_on wa_service, WA_SERVICE_URL=http://wa_service:3002, wa_auth_data volume
docker_fix_verification.workflow_yaml: valid YAML; wa_service build+push step present (lines 82-91); deploy step pulls WA_IMAGE and docker-runs wa-service BEFORE backend (lines 164-190); backend env WA_SERVICE_URL=http://wa-service:3002 present (line 212); backend depends on wa-service network

action_items: Docker fix is READY TO DEPLOY — Dockerfile, package.json, yarn.lock, index.js, docker-compose.yml, deploy.yml all verified.

STILL OPEN from iter288: fix cashier isolation on GET /api/cash-register/summary at shifts_routes.py:1339-1364 (raise 404 for non-managers when supplied shift_id not found under their cashier_id, mirroring close endpoint line 1580).
critical_code_review_comments: Dockerfile line 19-20: `yarn install --production --frozen-lockfile ... || yarn install --production` — the fallback masks lockfile drift; consider failing hard in CI. Acceptable trade-off for now.

docker-compose.yml service name is 'wa_service' but deploy.yml uses container name 'wa-service' (hyphen). Backend WA_SERVICE_URL differs: compose='http://wa_service:3002' (underscore) vs deploy.yml='http://wa-service:3002' (hyphen). This is intentional (compose uses service DNS, prod docker-run uses container name) but easy to break — worth a comment.
shifts_routes.py:1339-1364: cashier isolation still broken (unchanged from iter288).
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com/admin123; owner@maestroegp.com/owner123 secret_key=271018; closefix-cashier@maestroegp.com/test1234; wa_service token 'maestro-wa-7f3a91c4e6b2' via 'x-wa-token' header
seed_data_creation: used existing seed from iter288 (closefix-shift-owner + closefix-shift-cashier). No new seeds.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Docker build fix validated indirectly (no docker in preview) by: (a) YAML/JSON syntax checks, (b) live wa_service on supervisor proving JS deps work, (c) regression suite pass. Only remaining issue is pre-existing iter288 cashier isolation bug; unrelated to this task.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A for this iter — Docker build failure fix is verified via file inspection + live wa_service smoke test. The unfixed cashier-isolation bug RCA is captured in iter288 report.
